summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR candidates. No GitHub mutations are allowed by job mode or blocked_actions. No security-sensitive items were detected. None has a complete merge preflight; two have concrete branch-repair/finalization paths, and three should stay in maintainer review without merge/close actions.

actions.reason: Keep the contributor PR as the repair target, but require a narrow executor preflight: re-fetch live state, confirm mergeability against current main, rerun/record Codex /review or equivalent clean review evidence, verify review-bot findings are resolved, and run targeted command/session tests before any merge recommendation.

Failing Real behavior proof blocks merge. Because the PR is XS, maintainer-can-modify is true, and the files are narrow, the executor should repair or refresh the proof/check state on the contributor branch rather than replace the PR.

This is not a duplicate/closeout decision and should not be merged by inventory automation without maintainer judgment on the fail-closed delivery semantics and proof that the requested regression/review concern is fully satisfied.
This is a product/docs accuracy decision rather than a repairable code defect. Keep it for maintainer review; do not close as low-signal because the job disables that action.

The contributor branch is repairable because maintainer_can_modify is true and the intended Android change is narrow, but the executor should trim or justify the unrelated i18n/deadcode baseline churn, re-fetch status, and get clean review proof before merge.
Produce a cluster-scoped executable repair artifact for the bounded contributor-branch repairs only.

needs_human: #88885 requires maintainer judgment on message-delivery recovery semantics and regression adequacy before merge.
#88743 requires maintainer judgment on whether the Twilio A2P/10DLC docs guidance should land despite low-signal-docs/refactor-only labels.
#88899 remains status: waiting on author and has extra non-Android churn; executor can repair if maintainers want Clownfish to finalize it.
